rundown.note: Tuesday rundown. Voices of the City feature in the 07:15 slot. Pre-show prep from 05:30.

segment.title: Open and welcome
segment.detail: Cold open, date, weather headline, and the shape of the morning.

segment.title: Overnight news roundup
segment.detail: Three lead stories and one city story, kept tight before the first music sweep.

segment.title: Music sweep and traffic
segment.detail: Two tracks into the first traffic and weather beat for the commute.

segment.title: Talk point of the day
segment.detail: Open the lines on the morning question. Calls and listener messages.

segment.title: First interview
segment.detail: City affairs guest, pre-booked. Six prepared questions, room to follow the answer.

segment.title: Top of hour news and traffic
segment.detail: Hour marker, headlines refresh, traffic and weather update.

segment.title: Voices of the City
segment.detail: Season three, episode six broadcast. A Mozambican chef preserving family recipes in the city. Edited segment runs seven to eight minutes, followed by live calls.

segment.title: Music and listener messages
segment.detail: Two tracks and a read of the best messages on the feature.

segment.title: Culture and what is on this week
segment.detail: Three things to do in the city this week, one of them free.

segment.title: Top of hour news and traffic
segment.detail: Hour marker, headlines, traffic into the late commute.

segment.title: Second interview
segment.detail: Arts or community guest. Confirm arrival at reception fifteen minutes before air.

segment.title: Music run and quick questions
segment.detail: Three tracks, a light quiz, and listener call backs.

segment.title: Close and handover
segment.detail: Recap the morning, tease tomorrow, clean handover to the next show.
